hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push|vercel deploy|gh-pages'; then echo 'REMINDER: a push/deploy was detected. Per CLAUDE.md, remote/deploy operations require explicit user authorisation. Confirm this is intentional.' >&2; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); case "$file" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.css|*.json|*.html) if [ -f package.json ] && [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$file" >/dev/null 2>&1; fi;; esac
